summary: All six acceptance criteria proven against current code and fresh rerun. Imports clean, 796 tests OK, 24 admin tests OK (3 new update_event_subscription tests), restamp dry-run 0. Corpus shows both DomainNotifier and NodeNotifier UpdateSubscription = tested-pass; counts 202/121/38/361 match coverage doc.

commands.admin_module_verbose: PASS - Ran 24 tests OK (3 new update_event_subscription)

criteria.evidence: axxon_api_client.py:809 update_subscription_bounded with keyword-only signature; builds before/after EventFilters via build_pull_event_filters (lines 856-857), opens PullEvents on threading.Thread daemon (868-869), calls UpdateSubscription(UpdateSubscriptionRequest{subscription_id, filters_after}) (875-878), then DisconnectEventChannel (884-887). Maps domain->DomainNotifier, node->NodeNotifier (843). Returns status, notifier, service, subscription_applied, before_event_types, after_event_types, disconnect_clean (892-900).

UpdateSubscription wrapped in try/except -> applied=False + update_error, no raise (874-881). DisconnectEventChannel in its own try/except, always executes since the preceding update block swallows all exceptions (882-889). Background _hold thread swallows errors (861-866). Helper imports time as _time locally (839) and uses _time.sleep (870); no bare time.sleep NameError risk.

axxon_mcp_admin.py:708 update_event_subscription(notifier=domain,...,timeout_s=5.0); bad notifier returns gap dict with no wire call (717-718), clamps timeout with NOTIFIER_TIMEOUT_CAP_S=30.0 (719,31), calls update_subscription_bounded (721-728), returns redact_admin_secrets(result) + tool name (729). Listed in __all__ at line 27.

axxon_mcp_server.py:452 @server.tool(name=update_event_subscription) registered immediately after node_event_subscribe (435); delegates to admin.update_event_subscription; no new flag or create_server param.

3 new tests in test_axxon_mcp_admin.py:711,747,761. bad-notifier test asserts no update_subscription entry in fake.calls (772). applies-filters test asserts LICENSE marker absent (745) and timeout 99 clamped to NOTIFIER_TIMEOUT_CAP_S (732,740). Full suite 796 OK on rerun.

notes: AC2: disconnect runs unconditionally after the update try/except rather than literally inside a finally clause; functionally equivalent because the update block cannot raise.
Coverage doc line 149 (Shipped-but-unstamped section) is historical narrative for commit bc27e3e and is superseded by item 10l; not a count contradiction.
